name: humble-task-force
description: Humble Task Force ‚Äî manager‚Üîdeveloper ticket pipeline: /draft-ticket (interview the manager, produce a ready-to-run issue), /start-ticket (walkthrough + Q&A training, then plan, then build), /handoff (report from the real diff), /manager-review (check the PR against acceptance criteria), /setup-tickets (scaffold any repo).
